subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Help about any command

subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: Install a gem into the local repository

name: --platform
options.description: Specify the platform of gem to install

subcommands.name: cert
subcommands.description: Manage RubyGems certificates and signing settings

name: -a
--add
options.description: Add a trusted certificate

name: -l
--list
options.description: List trusted certificates where the subject contains FILTER

name: -r
--remove
options.description: Remove trusted certificates where the subject contains FILTER

name: -b
--build
options.description: Build private key and self-signed certificate for EMAIL_ADDR

name: -C
--certificate
options.description: Signing certificate for --sign

name: -K
--private-key
options.description: Key for --sign or --build

name: -A
--key-algorithm
options.description: Select which key algorithm to use for --build

name: -s
--sign
options.description: Signs CERT with the key from -K and the certificate from -C

name: -d
--days
options.description: Days before the certificate expires

name: -R
--re-sign
options.description: Re-signs the certificate from -C with the key from -K

subcommands.name: check
subcommands.description: Check a gem repository for added or missing files

name: -a
--alien
options.description: Report 'unmanaged' or rogue files in the gem repository

name: --no-alien
options.description: Report 'managed' or rogue files in the gem repository

name: --doctor
options.description: Clean up uninstalled gems and broken specifications

name: --no-doctor
options.description: Do not clean up uninstalled gems and broken specifications

name: --dry-run
options.description: Do not remove files, only report what would be removed

name: --no-dry-run
options.description: Remove files

name: --gems
options.description: Check installed gems for problems

name: --no-gems
options.description: Check not installed gems for problems

name: -v
--version
options.description: Specify version of gem to check

subcommands.name: cleanup
subcommands.description: Clean up old versions of installed gems

name: -n
-d
--dry-run
options.description: Do not uninstall gems

name: -D
--check-development
options.description: Check development dependencies while uninstalling (default: true)

name: --no-check-development
options.description: Do not check development dependencies while uninstalling

name: --user-install
options.description: Cleanup in user’s home directory instead of GEM_HOME

name: --no-user-install
options.description: Cleanup in GEM_HOME instead of user’s home directory

subcommands.name: contents
subcommands.description: Display the contents of the installed gems

name: -v
--version
options.description: Specify version of gem to contents

name: --all
options.description: Contents for all gems

name: -s
--spec-dir
options.description: Search for gems under specific paths

name: -l
--lib-only
options.description: Only return files in the Gem’s lib_dirs

name: --no-lib-only
options.description: Not only return files in the Gem’s lib_dirs

name: --prefix
options.description: Don’t include installed path prefix

name: --no-prefix
options.description: Include installed path prefix

name: --show-install-dir
options.description: Show only the gem install dir

name: --no-show-install-dir
options.description: Do not show only the gem install dir

args.name: GEMNAME
args.description: Name of gem to list contents for

subcommands.name: dependency

--version
options.description: Specify version of gem to dependency

name: --platform
options.description: Specify the platform of gem to dependency

name: --prerelease

name: --no-prerelease
options.description: Do not allow prerelease versions of a gem

--reverse-dependencies
options.description: Include reverse dependencies in the output

name: --no-reverse-dependencies
options.description: Do not include reverse dependencies in the output

options.description: Pipe Format (name --version ver)

--local
options.description: Restrict operations to the LOCAL domain

name: -r
--remote
options.description: Restrict operations to the REMOTE domain

name: -b
--both
options.description: Allow LOCAL and REMOTE operations

name: -B
--bulk-threshold
options.description: Threshold for switching to bulk synchronization (default 1000)

name: --clear-sources
options.description: Clear the gem sources

name: -s
--source
options.description: Append URL to list of remote gem sources

name: -p
--http-proxy

options.description: Do not use HTTP proxy for remote operations

subcommands.name: environment
subcommands.description: Display information about the RubyGems environment

suggestions.name: home
suggestions.description: Display the path where gems are installed. Aliases: gemhome, gemdir, GEM_HOME

suggestions.name: path
suggestions.description: Display path used to search for gems. Aliases: gempath, GEM_PATH

suggestions.name: user_gemhome
suggestions.description: Display the path where gems are installed when --user-install is given. Aliases: user_gemdir

--all

--exact

options.description: Do not allow prerelease versions of a gem

--installed

name: -v
--version

--version
options.description: Specify version of gem to restore to pristine condition

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: Update installed gems to the latest version

name: --system
options.description: Update the RubyGems system software

name: --platform
options.description: Update the RubyGems system software

name: --prerelease
options.description: Allow prerelease versions of a gem as update targets

name: --install-dir
-i
options.description: Gem repository directory to get installed gems

name: --bindir
-n
options.description: Directory where executables will be placed when the gem is installed

name: --document
options.description: Generate documentation for installed gems

name: --build-root
options.description: Temporary installation root. Useful for building packages. Do not use this when installing remote gems

name: --vendor
options.description: Install gem into the vendor directory. Only for use by gem repackagers

name: --no-document
-N
options.description: Disable documentation generation

name: --env-shebang
-E
options.description: Rewrite the shebang line on installed scripts to use /usr/bin/env

name: --force
-f
options.description: Force gem to install, bypassing dependency checks

name: --wrappers
-w
options.description: Use bin wrappers for executables. Not available on dosish platforms

name: --trust-policy
-P
options.description: Specify gem trust policy

name: --ignore-dependencies
options.description: Do not install any required dependent gems

name: --format-executable
options.description: Make installed executable names match Ruby

name: --user-install
options.description: Install in user's home directory instead of GEM_HOME

name: --development
options.description: Install additional development dependencies

name: --development-all
options.description: Install development dependencies for all gems (including dev deps themselves)

name: --conservative
options.description: Don't attempt to upgrade gems already meeting version requirement

name: --minimal-deps
options.description: Don't upgrade any dependencies that already meet version requirements

name: --post-install-message
options.description: Print post install message

name: --file
-g
options.description: Read from a gem dependencies API file and install the listed gems

name: --without
options.description: Omit the named groups (comma separated) when installing from a gem dependencies file

name: --default
options.description: Add the gem's full specification to specifications/default and extract only its bin

name: --explain
options.description: Rather than install the gems, indicate which would be installed

name: --lock
options.description: Create a lock file (when used with -g/--file)

name: --suggestions
options.description: Suggest alternates when gems are not found

args.name: GEMNAME
args.description: The gem(s) you want to update

name: --help
-h
options.description: Show help for gem

name: -V
--verbose
options.description: Set the verbose level of output

name: --no-verbose
options.description: Do not set the verbose level of output

name: -q
--quiet
options.description: Silence command progress meter

name: --silent
options.description: Silence RubyGems output

options.description: Use this config file instead of default

options.description: Turn on Ruby debugging

--version
